Hot Cocoa Pajama Party

Date: January 23, 2026
Time: 6:30 PM - 8:00 PM
Ages: All ages

About This Event

Join us for a magical winter evening at our Hot Cocoa Pajama Party! Wear your coziest pajamas or comfy clothes and bring everything you need for a snuggly reading experience.

What to Bring

  • Reading comfort: Yoga mat, pillow, and blankets
  • Your favorite winter stories to share with friends and family
  • Cozy attitude and ready-to-cuddle spirit!

What We'll Provide

  • Cozy reading corners set up throughout the store
  • Hot cocoa to warm you up
  • Lots of great winter books for you to explore and read
  • A magical atmosphere perfect for family bonding

Details

This is a special evening event perfect for families to slow down, get cozy, and enjoy the simple pleasure of reading together. Create warm winter memories while discovering new favorite books!

Registration

This event is now at full capacity. Thank you for your interest!

For questions, contact us at hello@thewanderinglantern.com or call (216) 999-4462.

Registration is now closed.
